## Title

[Short descriptive title]

## Context

[Describe the business or technical context for this risk]

## Owner

- **Agent Owner:** [Agent name]
- **Human Decision Approver:** [Name or role]
- **Accepted Risk Owner:** [Person accountable if risk is accepted]

## Risk Category

- [ ] Technical
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Privacy / Data
- [ ] Compliance / Regulatory
- [ ] Operational
- [ ] Financial
- [ ] Reputational
- [ ] Delivery / Schedule
- [ ] Other - describe:

## Likelihood

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Impact

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Risk Score

Use Likelihood x Impact (document the score and rationale):

| Likelihood | Impact | Score | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Low/Medium/High] | [Low/Medium/High] | [Score] | [Why this score was assigned] |

## Mitigation

[Primary actions to reduce likelihood or impact]

## Contingency

[Fallback plan if the risk materializes]

## Governance Gate Affected

- [ ] Gate 0 - Environment Readiness
- [ ] Gate 1 - Requirement Approval
- [ ] Gate 2 - Product Scope Approval
- [ ] Gate 3 - UX Approval
- [ ] Gate 4 - UI Approval
- [ ] Gate 5 - Architecture Approval
- [ ] Gate 6 - Release Approval
- [ ] Not gate-specific

## Release Blocker

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes - release must not proceed until resolved or explicitly accepted

## Related Artifact

[Link to markdown document, Figma file, GitHub issue, or decision record]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Risk category documented
- [ ] Likelihood and impact assessed
- [ ] Risk score calculated with rationale
- [ ] Mitigation plan documented
- [ ] Contingency plan documented
- [ ] Accepted risk owner identified
- [ ] Governance gate affected identified
- [ ] Release blocker status confirmed

## Decision Required

- [ ] No human decision required
- [ ] Yes - describe decision needed:

## Status

- [ ] Draft
- [ ] Review
- [ ] Approved
- [ ] Blocked
- [ ] Rejected
